name: Maple Walnut Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the active dry yeast in a bowl.
2. Add bread flour, whole wheat flour, and salt to the yeast mixture.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Melt butter/margarine and add maple syrup to the flour mixture.
5. Gradually mix in buttermilk and water until dough forms.
6. Transfer dough to a baking pan and sprinkle chopped walnuts on top.
7. Place the bread in the machine's automatic program for normal setting.
8. When the machine beeps 10 times, approximately 5 minutes before the end of the second kneading phase, add the chopped walnuts.
9. Allow the bread to bake for about 3 hours.
10. After baking, turn off the machine and remove the bread from the pan.
11. Let it cool completely before serving.
